description: NetSuite is Oracle’s cloud ERP and business management platform for finance, operations, commerce, and related business workflows. It lets customers manage NetSuite account data and customizations through web services, development tooling, and AI connector capabilities.
summary: NetSuite exposes an account-scoped SuiteTalk REST API, an account-scoped MCP server for the NetSuite AI Connector Service, and the SuiteCloud CLI for Node.js; REST supports OAuth 2.0 and token-based auth, while MCP and the CLI use OAuth-based account connections.
